title: wedelia goyazensis
intro: Wedelia goyazensis, also known as Wedelia or Flor de Lis, is a perennial herb native to Brazil, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been traditionally used in folk medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Wedelia goyazensis include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, as well as being used topically in ointments and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
